title: SBW Aeronautics compat
description: Mod aims to improve compatability through Superb Warfare and Create Aeronautics.
body:
Mod aims to improve compatability through Superb Warfare and Create Aeronautics.

Right now mod makes that SBW gun bullets collide with Aeronautics structures and dont just fly through and allows to lock on physical structures with Jaavelin.

Create, Aeronautics and Superb Warfare are required ofc.
